DECISION_PACKET.title: Approve community benevolence fund disbursement
DECISION_PACKET.decision: Disburse $2,500 from the benevolence fund to cover three months of utility bills for two member households facing imminent shutoff.
DECISION_PACKET.rationale: Floor-level provision support for members in documented hardship. Funds remain within the year's approved benevolence budget. Privacy preserved by handling via the small-team review committee, not full board.
red_items: No coercion of recipients (no requirements beyond confirming hardship)
Acting within authorized benevolence-fund role and current-year budget
floor_items: Both households have documented hardship (job loss / medical)
Disbursement within annual budget authority for the committee
DECISION_PACKET.way_path: Pay utility companies directly on behalf of households (avoids cash handling); document in the small-committee minutes; report aggregate (not names) to the broader leadership next quarter.
